Your place above Montauk's famed beaches.

Just across the road

Montauk's famed white sand, a few steps from your door.

Welcome

Relax, unwind, and enjoy the good life.

Welcome to Hartman's Briney Breezes — your vacation home on Old Montauk Highway, looking out over the Atlantic and the famed beaches that make this corner of Long Island unforgettable.

Sun-washed studios and suites, an outdoor pool, picnic and barbecue areas on the lawn, and warm, personal service from owners who treat every guest like family. It's the kind of place people come back to, summer after summer.

4.9Guest rating
20+Steps to the sand
5 minWalk to town

Suites & studios with a view.

Find us

On Old Montauk Highway, between town and the tide.

Walking distance to Montauk's restaurants and shops, with the beach just across the road and the village a few minutes away.
